source: Inferred physical AXI transactions from static HLS metadata and dynamic LLVM IR logical accesses; RTL simulation/waveforms are not used as input

inference_model.source: HLS interface metadata, static access pattern, and dynamic LLVM IR logical memory trace; no RTL simulation or waveform input
inference_model.coalescing_rule: compatible access sites, same port/direction, increasing logical offsets, same physical beat or next consecutive AXI beat, bounded by max_read/write_burst_length

axi_transactions.coalescing_reason: inferred from HLS M_AXI width/burst metadata and IR trace offsets

timing_model.formula: one logical issue slot for pipelined outstanding reads
timing_model.read_outstanding_limit_model: num_read_outstanding=16: this AXI master can keep multiple read requests in flight, so consecutive read transactions may be issued close together

dependency_details.reason: stored value operand is defined by, or computed from, the source access

timing_model.formula: dependency readiness plus max(axi_beat_count, useful_element_count * achieved_loop_ii) plus one visual request-gap slot
